description: Auto Runner Configuration - Define scheduled tasks for automated operations

default_jobs.description: Daily system health check at midnight UTC
Update analytics every hour (disabled by default)
Clean up old data every Sunday at 2 AM UTC
Daily ML model health check at 6 AM UTC

available_tasks.health_check: System health check - validates system status
available_tasks.cleanup_old_data: Data cleanup - removes temporary and old data
available_tasks.analytics_update: Analytics update - refreshes analytics and statistics
available_tasks.batch_predictions: Batch predictions - processes queued prediction requests
available_tasks.model_health_check: Model health check - validates ML model performance

usage_notes: All times are in UTC timezone
Jobs with enabled=false will not run but are saved for reference
Use the API endpoints to add, remove, or modify jobs at runtime
Job history is kept for the last 100 executions
Only one instance of each job can run at a time (prevents overlapping executions)
